allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem node_modules\\electron\\ -Depth 0 | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; node node_modules\\electron\\install.js)

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content node_modules\\electron\\package.json | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Electron version in package:" $pkg.version; Write-Host "`n--- Testing mirror URLs ---"; try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mirrors.huaweicloud.com/electron/" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Huawei mirror: OK" } catch { Write-Host "Huawei mirror: FAILED - $_" })
